title: Icy
description: A Minecraft Modpack That has been made for  both low end mobile and pc devices!
body:
## Description

Many modpacks were created for better optimization, but none of them were made for low-end PCs or even for being compatible with mobile launchers. Don't worry anymore; introducing Icy, a Minecraft ultra-optimization modpack made for low-end PCs and mobiles. With Icy, you can get a huge FPS boost and performance. We tested it on mobile and PCs, and the results were huge. No need to explain more; download Icy now and check it by yourself!

## Notes

- Modpack Needs [MobileGlues](https://github.com/Swung0x48/MobileGlues-release) To be installed to run the modpack on mobile or you can download krypton wrapper [Krypton Wrapper](https://github.com/BZLZHH/NG-GL4ES).

- At least 4 GB of RAM is required to run smoothly on mobile.

- as well 2 cores 4 threads 4gb of RAM is required to run smoothly on pc.

- This modpack is only available on Modrith.
